results.title: Kankola / Tailed Pepper in Ayurveda : The Aromatic Fruit for Digestion, Kapha and Respiratory Balance
results.description: The name “tailed pepper” comes from the small stalk attached to the dried berry, giving it a tail-like appearance. It resembles black pepper but has a more aromatic, slightly bitter and camphor-like fragrance. The post Kankola / Tailed Pepper in Ayurveda : The Aromatic Fruit for Digestion, Kapha and Respiratory Balance appeared first on Dharmakshethra - India Unabridged | Defence, Diplomacy, Economy, Health, Ayurveda, Heritage .
